headline: Jim Cramer on Progressive Corporation: “That Group Is Under a Lot of Pressure”
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money, as he highlighted worthy space players and reviewed several of this year’s IPOs. When a caller mentioned that it might be the time to start a position in the stock, Cramer said: You know, I gotta tell you, that group is under […]
